channel.title: INtopBackup
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Malinowski concedes to Mejia in Democratic House special primary in New Jersey
item.description: With the race still too close to call, former congressman Tom Malinowski conceded to challenger Analilia Mejia in a Democratic primary to replace the ...

item.title: Top 5 takeaways from the House immigration oversight hearing
item.description: The hearing underscored how deeply divided Republicans and Democrats remain on top-level changes to immigration enforcement in the wake of the shootin...

item.title: A historic day for U.S. cross-country skiing, but Shiffin's Olympic struggles continue
item.description: American women continue to dominate alpine ski racing events in the Winter Olympics, and American men win their first medal in cross-country skiing in...

item.title: Pakistan-Afghanistan border closures paralyze trade along a key route
item.description: Trucks have been stuck at the closed border since October. Both countries are facing economic losses with no end in sight. The Taliban also banned all...

item.title: Snowboarder Chloe Kim is chasing an Olympic gold three-peat with a torn labrum
item.description: At 25, Chloe Kim could become the first halfpipe snowboarder to win three consecutive Olympic golds.

item.title: Bid launched to extend Zimbabwe president's term in office
item.description: President Mnangagwa's term in office is due to end in 2028 but a bill could open the way for him to extend that time.

item.title: Jury selection begins in trial of Utah children's author accused of poisoning husband
item.description: Jury selection is underway in the murder trial of a Utah woman accused of poisoning her husband and later writing a children's book about grief. CBS N...

item.title: Gov. Tim Walz says federal immigration crackdown in Minnesota could end within days
NATO to shift 2 commands from U.S. to European leadership
item.description: Two NATO Joint Force Commands led by U.S. officers will transition to be European-led in an apparent answer to President Trump's calls for Europe to c...

item.title: FBI releases images of masked person in hunt for Savannah Guthrie's mother
item.description: The mother of the news anchor Savannah disappeared in the middle of night from her Tucson, Arizona, home and was last seen on 31 January.

item.title: FBI releases surveillance images of masked person on Nancy Guthrie’s porch
item.description: A masked person with a handgun holster was caught on camera outside Nancy Guthrie’s front door the night she disappeared.

item.title: FBI search of Georgia offices tied to probe of possible 2020 election ‘defects,’ affidavit says
Ex-police chief said Trump told him in 2006 'everyone' knew of Epstein's behaviour
item.description: The now-president allegedly called police in Florida who were investigating Epstein and said "thank goodness you're stopping him".

item.title: FBI releases new photos, videos of subject in Nancy Guthrie disappearance
item.description: FBI Director Kash Patel posted videos​ of a person outside the home of Nancy Guthrie, the mother of Savannah Guthrie, on the morning of her disappeara...

item.title: Under-fire Trump commerce secretary confirms he visited Epstein's island
item.description: Howard Lutnick says he had lunch on the island in 2012, contradicting previous claims he had cut ties with Jeffrey Epstein in 2005.

item.title: "Fraud tourists" from Philly plead guilty to defrauding Minnesota programs
item.description: Two Philadelphia-based men accused of traveling to Minneapolis after a friend told them the taxpayer-funded programs there presented "a good opportuni...

item.title: Trump threatens to block opening of US-Canada bridge
item.description: The White House has reiterated its demands even after a 'positive' call between Trump and Mark Carney.

item.title: 2/1: Sunday Morning
item.description: Hosted by Jane Pauley. Featured: Olympic figure skater Ilia Malinin; author and podcaster Mel Robbins; Jeff Tweedy of Wilco; folk singer Jesse Welles;...
